title: Natural Language-Driven Automation for Network Device Management with Large Language Models
authors: Hasbian Alif, Yulius Denny Prabowo, Viga Laksa Hardjanto
publish: 2025 1st International Conference on Emerging Trends in Information Systems and Informatics (ICETISI)
abstract: An optimized network infrastructure is essential for ensuring the reliability, security, and growth of IT-based businesses. However, operating network devices often requires advanced technical knowledge, which can become a significant barrier for non-technical users, particularly in large-scale networks. This study presents the development of a web-based network automation application utilizing Natural Language Processing (NLP) to minimize dependency on deep technical expertise in network operations. Using Python, Netmiko, and the OpenAI API, the system translates natural language commands into executable network actions. Experimental evaluation consisting of 30 test cases shows that the system successfully executed the intended function calls in 27 cases (90% success rate). User interface latency was recorded between 2 and 10 seconds, while device connection times ranged from 3 to 5 seconds. All reported values are based on direct measurement during controlled functional testing. These results demonstrate that NLP-based automation can effectively simplify network operations, improve accessibility, and enhance efficiency in managing network infrastructure.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的自然语言驱动网络设备管理自动化
abstract_zh: 优化的网络基础设施对于确保基于IT业务的可靠性、安全性和可持续发展至关重要。然而，网络设备的日常运维通常需要较高的专业技术知识，这在大规模网络环境中对非技术人员构成了显著障碍。本研究提出了一种基于Web的网络自动化应用，利用自然语言处理（NLP）技术，以降低网络运维对深度技术专长的依赖。系统采用Python、Netmiko和OpenAI API，将自然语言指令转化为可执行的网络操作。在30个测试用例的实验评估中，系统成功执行了预期功能调用27次，成功率高达90%。用户界面响应延迟在2至10秒之间，设备连接时间介于3至5秒。所有数据均基于受控功能测试中的直接测量结果。研究结果表明，基于NLP的自动化技术能够有效简化网络操作流程，提升系统可访问性，并显著提高网络基础设施管理的效率。

title: Analysis and Design of a Parametric Hybrid Adder with Tunable Accuracy Using Kogge-Stone and Approximate Ripple-Carry Architecture
authors: Akshat Sharma, Koulab Mukherjee, M Suresh
publish: 2025 IEEE DELCON - International Conference on Recent Smart Technologies in Engineering for Sustainable Development
abstract: As modern computing systems face escalating demands for performance under strict power constraints, approximate computing has emerged as a critical design paradigm. This paper presents the design, implementation, and comprehensive analysis of a novel 32-bit hybrid accurate-approximate adder architecture. The proposed design strategically combines a Kogge-Stone Parallel Prefix Adder for the most significant part with a lowpower, structurally simple approximate Ripple-Carry Adder for the least significant part for case 1, and a sum-less adder for case 2. The design was implemented in a modular Verilog hierarchy and subjected to a rigorous analysis using Xilinx Vivado for various partition configurations (k). Our post-implementation results demonstrate significant hardware efficiency gains: the total power consumption is reduced by up to 29 % and LUT area is reduced by up to 74.3 % in case of a hybrid KSA+ approximate adder(case 1) and up to 91.4 % in area and up to 48.3 % in power for a KSA+ sum-less hybrid adder design (case 2) as the hybrid partition parameter, k, is increased. However, a detailed error analysis reveals that the high error rates, which saturate near 100 % for <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$k \geq 16$</tex> (case 1), are dominated by error from the approximate section. We also observed that even though overall error rates can saturate as the value of k is increased, the fact that the most significant bits remain accurate as k is increased allows one to leverage this behaviour for various applications where only the most significant bits of the final sum are important. This work thoroughly characterizes a unique design point in the power-performance-accuracy space, concluding that this architecture is highly effective for applications where hardware cost is the primary concern and error tolerance is high.
title_zh: 基于Kogge-Stone与近似行波进位架构的可调精度参数化混合加法器的分析与设计
abstract_zh:
随着现代计算系统在严格功耗约束下对性能需求的不断攀升，近似计算已成为一种关键的设计范式。本文提出了一种新型32位混合精确-近似加法器架构的设计、实现与全面分析。该设计在高位部分采用Kogge-Stone并行前缀加法器（KSA），在低位部分则分别结合低功耗、结构简单的近似行波加法器（Case 1）或无和输出加法器（Case 2），以实现性能与功耗的优化平衡。该架构采用模块化的Verilog层次结构实现，并通过Xilinx Vivado工具对多种分割配置（k值）进行了严格的分析与评估。

后综合结果表明，该设计在硬件效率方面取得了显著提升：在混合KSA+近似加法器（Case 1）中，总功耗最高降低29%，查找表（LUT）面积最多减少74.3%；而在KSA+无和输出混合加法器设计（Case 2）中，面积最多减少91.4%，功耗最多降低48.3%。这些优势随着混合分割参数k的增大而愈发明显。

然而，详细的误差分析显示，当k ≥ 16时（Case 1），误差率迅速上升并趋于接近100%，且主要来源于近似部分的误差。尽管整体误差率随k增大趋于饱和，但值得注意的是，随着k的增加，加法器的最高有效位（MSB）始终保持精确。这一特性使得该设计在某些应用场景中具有重要价值——即当最终结果中仅最高有效位具有重要意义时，可充分利用这一特性实现高效设计。

本研究全面刻画了功耗-性能-精度三者之间的独特权衡点，结论表明：该架构在硬件成本为主要考量因素且具备较高容错能力的应用场景中表现出极高的有效性。

title: High-Level Synthesis of AlexNet CNN based model for Brain Tumor Diagnosis through FPGA Deployment Using Vitis HLS
publish: 2025 13th International Conference on Intelligent Systems and Embedded Design (ISED)
abstract: This research aims to investigate and optimize the design parameters for the synthesis of a hardware accelerator for the AlexNet convolutional neural network (CNN) model using Vitis High-Level Synthesis (HLS). This work establishes a crucial baseline for deployment on the ZCU102 FPGA platform. The primary objective was to convert the Alex Net model, which is traditionally implemented in Python, into a hardwarecompatible format. We also aimed to evaluate its synthesis performance and deploy it on the ZCU102 FPGA board. To achieve the desired accuracy, we first implemented the AlexNet architecture in Python for image classification tasks and trained the model. Subsequently, we extracted the trained weights and biases and translated them into a programming language (C) to facilitate hardware synthesis. Our AlexNet CNN model provides insights into important hardware performance metrics, including latency, resource utilization, and optimization techniques such as bit-width quantization for weights and biases, code compression, and potential violations at various layers of the design. Ultimately, our proposed design achieved a training accuracy of 97.8%, with a 7% error rate and a timing latency of 7.215 ns, without any negative slack. Due to the model’s minimal resource usage, it was successfully deployed on the ZCU102 FPGA board, demonstrating its feasibility for developing a prototype for brain tumor detection.
title_zh: 基于FPGA部署的Vitis HLS实现AlexNet卷积神经网络模型的高层次综合用于脑肿瘤诊断
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在通过Vitis高层次综合（HLS）技术，探究并优化用于合成AlexNet卷积神经网络（CNN）模型的硬件加速器设计参数。该工作为在ZCU102 FPGA平台上部署提供了关键基准。主要目标是将传统上以Python实现的AlexNet模型转换为硬件兼容格式，并评估其综合性能，最终部署到ZCU102 FPGA开发板上。为实现预期的精度，我们首先在Python中实现AlexNet架构，用于图像分类任务，并完成模型训练。随后，提取训练后的权重和偏置，并将其转换为C语言代码，以支持硬件综合。所提出的AlexNet CNN模型揭示了多项重要的硬件性能指标，包括延迟、资源利用率，以及诸如权重与偏置的位宽量化、代码压缩技术，以及设计各层可能存在的时序违规等问题。最终，本设计在未出现负松弛（negative slack）的情况下，实现了97.8%的训练准确率，误差率为7%，时序延迟仅为7.215纳秒。由于模型资源占用极低，成功部署于ZCU102 FPGA开发板，验证了其在脑肿瘤检测原型系统开发中的可行性。

title: Performance Comparison of Machine Learning Models in Data-Driven Receiver Circuit Design
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Mechanical Automation and Electronic Information Engineering (MAEIE)
abstract: With the rapid development of artificial intelligence, machine learning, and electronic design automation (EDA) technologies, data-driven automation methods are gradually becoming the core approach driving electronic system design, optimization, and verification. Traditional circuit design methods typically rely on engineers’ experience and repeated simulations, facing challenges such as high computational complexity, long debugging cycles, and large-dimensional design parameters. This paper systematically explores an automated design framework based on data-driven principles, comprehensively comparing the performance differences among several mainstream machine learning models (linear regression, ridge regression, decision tree, random forest, and XGBoost). Combined with the SHAP feature importance analysis method, the study further investigates the interpretability and optimization potential of these models in Receiver circuit design. Through empirical analysis on a Receiver circuit dataset, the study finds that XGBoost and random forest models outperform traditional linear algorithms in terms of Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) and the coefficient of determination (R<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>), exhibiting stronger generalization and stability. The results demonstrate that data-driven automated design methods offer significant advantages in shortening the design cycle, improving prediction accuracy, and enabling adaptive circuit optimization.
title_zh: 数据驱动的接收机电路设计中机器学习模型的性能比较
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能、机器学习以及电子设计自动化（EDA）技术的快速发展，数据驱动的自动化方法正逐渐成为推动电子系统设计、优化与验证的核心手段。传统的电路设计方法通常依赖工程师的经验和反复的仿真，面临计算复杂度高、调试周期长以及设计参数维度大等挑战。本文系统地探讨了一种基于数据驱动原理的自动化设计框架，全面比较了多种主流机器学习模型（线性回归、岭回归、决策树、随机森林和XGBoost）在性能上的差异。结合SHAP特征重要性分析方法，研究进一步探究了这些模型在接收机电路设计中的可解释性及优化潜力。通过对接收机电路数据集的实证分析，研究发现XGBoost和随机森林模型在平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）和决定系数（R²）方面均优于传统线性算法，展现出更强的泛化能力和稳定性。结果表明，数据驱动的自动化设计方法在缩短设计周期、提高预测精度以及实现自适应电路优化方面具有显著优势。

title: Design and Implementation of A DSP-Enhanced RISC-V Pipelined Processor Using Verilog HDL
authors: Aditya Goswami, Kumar Rishi, Vineet Kumar, Nikhat Anjum, Pragyan Parimita Padhan, Prashant Pranav, Pooja Kumari, Pratyush Pranjal, Vijay Nath
publish: 2025 13th International Conference on Intelligent Systems and Embedded Design (ISED)
abstract: This paper presents the design and implementation of a 5-stage pipelined RISC-V processor architecture augmented with DSP (Digital Signal Processing) capabilities using Verilog HDL. The processor architecture integrates essential pipeline stages-Instruction Fetch, Decode, Execute, Memory Access, and Write Back-enhanced by advanced modules such as hazard detection and forwarding units to support efficient instructionlevel parallelism. A specialised ALU is developed to support both arithmetic/logical operations, as well as DSP-centric computations, optimising performance for signal processing applications. The system is verified using a custom testbench in Vivado 2025.1, and waveform analysis confirms accurate pipeline behaviour and DSP instruction execution. This processor is targeted for embedded and real-time systems requiring lowpower, high-performance computation with programmable logic integration.
title_zh: 基于Verilog HDL的DSP增强型RISC-V流水线处理器的设计与实现
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于Verilog HDL设计与实现的一种五级流水线RISC-V处理器架构，该架构通过集成数字信号处理（DSP）功能进行增强。处理器架构包含五个关键流水线阶段——指令获取、指令译码、执行、内存访问和写回，并通过先进的冲突检测与前递单元等模块，支持高效的指令级并行性。为满足信号处理应用的需求，设计了一种专用的算术逻辑单元（ALU），能够同时支持常规的算术/逻辑运算以及面向DSP的计算任务，从而显著提升处理性能。系统采用Vivado 2025.1中的自定义测试平台进行验证，波形分析结果表明流水线行为准确，DSP指令执行正确。该处理器面向需要低功耗、高性能计算能力并支持可编程逻辑集成的嵌入式与实时系统。

title: Localized Large Model Trusted Computing System Based on LAN Computing Resource Pool Construction
publish: 2025 6th International Symposium on Computer Engineering and Intelligent Communications (ISCEIC)
abstract: This study adopts Kubernetes container orchestration technology to build 9 consumer-grade computers (equipped with Intel Core i9-14900KF and NVIDIA RTX 4080 Super) into a unified computing power cluster. A unified scheduling of computing resources is achieved through an architecture consisting of 1 master node and 8 worker nodes. To address the high hardware resource requirements of large models such as DeepSeek-R1-671B and Qwen, Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) technology is used to reduce the model precision from FP32 to INT4. Meanwhile, distributed slicing deployment of the models is realized via technologies including tensor parallelism and pipeline parallelism. The system constructs a Node.js-based backend API service and a React frontend interface, enabling a user-friendly interaction experience with large models. In addition, Docker multi-stage build technology is applied to achieve rapid containerized deployment of the system.
title_zh: 基于局域网计算资源池构建的本地化大模型可信计算系统
abstract_zh: 本研究采用Kubernetes容器编排技术，将9台消费级计算机（配备Intel Core i9-14900KF处理器和NVIDIA RTX 4080 Super显卡）整合为一个统一的计算资源集群。通过由1个主节点和8个工作节点组成的架构，实现了计算资源的统一调度。为应对DeepSeek-R1-671B、Qwen等大模型对硬件资源的高需求，采用后训练量化（Post-Training Quantization, PTQ）技术，将模型精度从FP32降低至INT4，有效减少内存占用与计算开销。同时，借助张量并行（tensor parallelism）和流水线并行（pipeline parallelism）等技术，实现了模型的分布式分片部署。系统构建了基于Node.js的后端API服务与React开发的前端界面，为用户提供友好的大模型交互体验。此外，采用Docker多阶段构建技术，实现了系统的快速容器化部署。

title: Maintenance Decision Support System for Multiple Units Based on High-Quality Knowledge Graphs
authors: Juexiang Ye, Xue Li, Lanshun Nie, Keqiang Song, Dechen Zhan, Chengjie Sun
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
abstract: As rail transit rapidly develops and its applications expand, the maintenance of multiple units (MUs) plays a pivotal role in ensuring the safety of train operations and enhancing operational efficiency. However, the maintenance process encompasses a vast amount of complex and dispersed professional knowledge, presenting significant challenges in the effective management and utilization of this information. Existing knowledge management methodologies often struggle to integrate maintenance-related knowledge of MUs, leading to low rates of knowledge utilization. To address these issues, this study proposes a decision support system (DSS) that integrates knowledge graphs with large language models (LLMs). We have designed an automated graph construction framework to systematically extract knowledge from professional literature, thereby building high-quality knowledge graphs. By incorporating the BGM-RSRL prompt framework with LLMs, we have developed an efficient DSS. Experimental results demonstrate that the system accurately identifies complex maintenance requirements for MUs and provides comprehensive decision support.
title_zh: 基于高质量知识图谱的多单元维护决策支持系统
abstract_zh: 随着轨道交通的快速发展及其应用领域的不断拓展，动车组（MUs）的维护工作在保障列车运行安全、提升运营效率方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，动车组维护过程涉及大量复杂且分散的专业知识，给这些信息的有效管理与利用带来了巨大挑战。现有的知识管理方法往往难以有效整合动车组相关的维护知识，导致知识利用率低下。为解决上述问题，本研究提出了一种融合知识图谱与大语言模型（LLMs）的决策支持系统（DSS）。我们设计了一种自动化的图谱构建框架，能够从专业文献中系统地提取知识，从而构建高质量的知识图谱。通过将BGM-RSRL提示框架与大语言模型相结合，我们开发出一种高效的决策支持系统。实验结果表明，该系统能够准确识别动车组复杂的维护需求，并提供全面的决策支持。

title: Design and Implementation of a 32-bit RISC-V Pipelined Processor by using Verilog for IoT
authors: Suman Kumari, Ashutosh Gupta, Kaushiki, Piyush Kumar Singh, Pooja Kumari, Pragyan Parimita Padhan, Prashant Pranav, Vineet Kumar, Vijay Nath
publish: 2025 13th International Conference on Intelligent Systems and Embedded Design (ISED)
abstract: In this paper, we discuss the need for customized, resource-efficient processing units in low-power Internet of Things (IoT) edge devices. The challenge in these environments is to balance high instruction throughput with a small hardware footprint and low energy use. We present the design and implementation of a 32-bit RISC-V pipelined processor using Verilog HDL. This processor is used in a real-time system that integrates humidity sensing and data display, and it runs on an FPGA platform. Sensor data comes in via UART, gets processed by the RISC-V core, and is sent to an ESP32 microcontroller for output display. The proposed design has a traditional five-stage pipeline (IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB) made for embedded applications with memory-mapped peripheral interfaces. Simulation and synthesis results on an Artix-7 FPGA show that the design is functionally correct, uses hardware efficiently (approximately 18percent LUT utilization), and is suitable for real-time, low-power IoT systems.
title_zh: 基于Verilog的32位RISC-V流水线处理器设计与实现——面向物联网应用
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了在低功耗物联网（IoT）边缘设备中，对定制化、资源高效处理单元的需求。在这些环境中，面临的挑战是如何在保证高指令吞吐量的同时，实现较小的硬件面积和低功耗。本文提出并实现了一款基于Verilog HDL的32位RISC-V流水线处理器。该处理器被应用于一个实时系统，集成了湿度传感与数据显示功能，并运行在FPGA平台上。传感器数据通过UART接口输入，经由RISC-V核心处理后，发送至ESP32微控制器进行输出显示。所提出的处理器采用传统的五级流水线结构（取指IF、译码ID、执行EX、访存MEM、写回WB），专为具有内存映射外设接口的嵌入式应用而设计。在Artix-7 FPGA平台上的仿真与综合结果表明，该设计功能正确，硬件资源利用高效（LUT利用率约为18%），适用于实时、低功耗的物联网系统。

title: A Comprehensive Review of Microsoft Semantic Kernel: Architecture, Capabilities, and Research Directions
publish: 2025 IEEE DELCON - International Conference on Recent Smart Technologies in Engineering for Sustainable Development
abstract: The incorporation of large language models (LLMs) in company software amplified the necessity for efficient AI orchestration systems. Microsoft Semantic Kernel is an optimized open-source system specifically for the implementation of LLMs in customary software systems. Despite its widespread popularity in corporate settings, specifically in Fortune 500 organizations, there is limited scientific research available pertaining to its architecture, characteristics, and disadvantages. This report gives an in-depth analysis of Semantic Kernel, including its fundamental constituents—kernel orchestration, plugin ecosystem, semantic memory, and agent framework—and implementations in multiple languages in C, Python, and Java. A comparative report with other frameworks like LangChain outlines the advantages of Semantic Kernel in maintaining dynamic and concurrent task orchestration. The work outlines key performance characteristics, integration possibilities, and current limitations and outlines useful insights into its applicability in practical AI engineering. In addition, the directions for future improvements are discussed in order to broaden the use in enterprise-scale AI systems.
title_zh: 微软语义内核全面综述：架构、功能与研究方向
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）融入公司软件，显著提升了对高效人工智能编排系统的需求。微软的Semantic Kernel 是一个专为在传统软件系统中实现 LLM 而优化的开源系统。尽管该系统在企业环境中，尤其是在财富500强企业中广受欢迎，但关于其架构、特性及局限性的科学研究仍较为有限。本报告对 Semantic Kernel 进行了深入分析，涵盖其核心组成部分——内核编排、插件生态系统、语义记忆以及代理框架，并探讨了其在 C、Python 和 Java 等多种语言中的实现。通过与 LangChain 等其他框架的对比，报告突出了 Semantic Kernel 在动态与并发任务编排方面的优势。此外，本文还总结了其关键性能特征、集成可能性以及当前存在的局限性，为实际人工智能工程应用提供了有价值的见解。最后，文章还探讨了未来改进方向，旨在推动其在企业级人工智能系统中的更广泛应用。

title: Approximate Computing-Based VLSI Architecture for Optimized 2D FIR Filter Implementation
authors: Abhishek Inguva, Nikhil Srinivas Charugundla, Shreya Reddy Konatham, Venkata Krishna Odugu, Harish Babu Gade
publish: 2025 IEEE DELCON - International Conference on Recent Smart Technologies in Engineering for Sustainable Development
abstract: The evolution of VLSI design methodologies has led to significant advancements in optimizing digital circuits in terms of Area Complexity (AC), Power Consumption (PC), and Latency. One of the promising approaches for achieving optimizations is the use of approximate computation. The approximate computations enhance the area, reduce power, and drastically improve the speed of the arithmetic architecture with adequate precision. The architecture of a Two-Dimensional FIR (2DFIR) filter can be optimized by incorporating the approximation in applications such as image processing. The approximation can be introduced in the 2DFIR Filter Architecture (2DFIRFA) by employing approximate compressors in multipliers with tolerable accuracy. The Exact 4:2 Compressor (E42C) is altered into an Approximate 4:2 Compressor (A42C) by bypassing certain inputs. In this work, the 2D FIR architecture is designed with the incorporation of Circular Symmetry (CS) to reduce the utilization of hardware components. The combined approach of using approximate computing and CS leads to a highly optimized 2DFIRFA. The designed work is synthesized by the Vivado tool from Xilinx and the Genus tool from Cadence 45 nm CMOS technology. As a result, both hardware and delay constraints are optimized, making it particularly advantageous for real-time image processing. The design leverages this approach to enhance performance while reducing complexity.
title_zh: 基于近似计算的VLSI架构用于优化二维FIR滤波器实现
abstract_zh: VLSI设计方法学的演进推动了数字电路在面积复杂度（AC）、功耗（PC）和延迟方面的显著优化。其中，近似计算是一种极具前景的优化手段。近似计算能够在保证足够精度的前提下，显著提升面积利用率、降低功耗，并大幅提高算术架构的运行速度。在图像处理等应用中，二维有限冲激响应滤波器（2DFIR）架构可通过引入近似计算实现优化。具体而言，可在2DFIR滤波器架构（2DFIRFA）中，通过在乘法器中采用近似压缩器来引入近似性，从而在可接受的精度损失范围内实现性能提升。本文将精确的4:2压缩器（E42C）改造为近似4:2压缩器（A42C），通过旁路部分输入信号实现近似计算。此外，本研究在2D FIR架构中引入了循环对称性（CS）设计，以进一步减少硬件资源的使用。将近似计算与循环对称性相结合，显著提升了2DFIRFA的整体优化水平。所设计的电路采用Xilinx的Vivado工具和Cadence的Genus工具，基于45 nm CMOS工艺进行综合实现。结果表明，该设计在硬件资源占用和延迟方面均得到显著优化，特别适用于实时图像处理场景。该方案在提升性能的同时有效降低了系统复杂度。

title: FPGA-Based Secure Automated Car Parking System Using FSM and VHDL
authors: Amrit Raj, Deepti Kakkar, Rishabh Upadhyay, Lavkush Yadav
publish: 2025 IEEE DELCON - International Conference on Recent Smart Technologies in Engineering for Sustainable Development
abstract: Rapid urbanization and the increasing number of vehicles have amplified the demand for secure, efficient, and real-time parking management. Conventional manual or microcontroller-based systems often suffer from congestion, delays, and limited reliability. This paper proposes a fully automated and hardware-centric car parking system implemented on a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) using Finite State Machine (FSM) logic coded in VHDL. The design integrates dual infrared (IR) sensors for vehicle detection, a dual-password authentication mechanism for secure access, relaydriven gate operation, and dual 7 -segment displays for real-time slot availability. The system was modeled and verified in Vivado and implemented on the Xilinx Artix-7 (Mimas A7) FPGA board. Experimental validation demonstrated deterministic FSM transitions with an average system response time of 0.25 seconds, 98 % slot detection accuracy, and errorfree password authentication. Compared to microcontroller-based approaches, the FPGA design achieves higher speed, improved security, and modular scalability. Furthermore, the architecture provides a foundation for future enhancements such as IoTenabled reservations, cloud monitoring, and license plate recognition, making it highly suitable for deployment in next-generation smart parking infrastructures.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的使用FSM和VHDL的 secure 自动化汽车停车系统
abstract_zh: 快速的城市化以及车辆数量的持续增长，使得对安全、高效且实时的停车管理需求日益增加。传统的手动或基于微控制器的系统往往存在拥堵、延迟以及可靠性有限等问题。本文提出了一种完全自动化且以硬件为核心的汽车停车系统，该系统基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）实现，采用VHDL语言编写的有限状态机（FSM）逻辑。设计中集成了双红外（IR）传感器用于车辆检测，双密码认证机制保障访问安全，继电器驱动的道闸控制，以及两个七段数码管实时显示空余车位信息。系统在Vivado环境中完成建模与验证，并部署于Xilinx Artix-7（Mimas A7）FPGA开发板上。实验验证结果表明，系统实现了确定性的FSM状态转换，平均响应时间仅为0.25秒，车位检测准确率达到98%，密码认证无错误。相较于基于微控制器的方案，该FPGA设计方案在速度、安全性及模块化可扩展性方面均有显著提升。此外，该架构为未来功能扩展奠定了基础，例如支持物联网（IoT）预约、云端监控以及车牌识别等功能，因此非常适用于下一代智能停车基础设施的部署。

title: Enhancing Contextual Retrieval and Generation of Text through RAG and Knowledge Graph with Custom Cosine Similarity
authors: Sanjib Kumar Raul, Kvtkn Prashanth, Nidhi Vadodariya, T. Ramakrishnudu
publish: 2025 13th International Conference on Intelligent Systems and Embedded Design (ISED)
abstract: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) models improve large language models by providing a context-aware prompt-before-prompt kind of mechanism. The RAG framework appends the strengths of retrieval methods with generative models. Consequently, it improves the performance of responsegenerating tasks, such as question answering, summarization, and conversational agents. However, the context of queries could be improved with knowledge graphs. To address this, we propose an enhanced RAG model that integrates knowledge graphs and a novel custom similarity function to improve the open-domain question answering. Our method uses dynamic chunking guided by the structure of the knowledge graph and agglomerative clustering with custom cosine similarity, where, each term of similarity function mimics progressive similarity aggregation. This improves the retrieval accuracy and performance of the proposed model by enhancing both the relevance and diversity of the retrieved chunks.
title_zh: 通过RAG与知识图谱结合自定义余弦相似度提升文本的上下文检索与生成能力
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG）模型通过引入一种“提示前提示”的上下文感知机制，提升了大型语言模型的性能。RAG框架将检索方法的优势与生成模型相结合，从而显著提升了问答、摘要生成以及对话系统等生成任务的表现。然而，查询的上下文信息仍可通过知识图谱进一步增强。为此，我们提出了一种改进的RAG模型，该模型融合了知识图谱与一种新颖的自定义相似度函数，以提升开放域问答的性能。我们的方法利用知识图谱的结构指导动态分块，并结合基于自定义余弦相似度的凝聚聚类算法，其中相似度函数的每一项均模拟了逐步相似性聚合的过程。这一机制有效提升了检索的准确性，增强了所检索文本块的相关性与多样性，从而显著提高了模型的整体性能。

title: Toward Hybrid LLM-Assisted Vulnerability Detection for Continuous Integration: A Bias-Free Framework with a Context-Rich Dataset
authors: Ashmit Avinash Patil, Lavesh Anil Patil, Radhakrishna Rambola
publish: 2025 IEEE DELCON - International Conference on Recent Smart Technologies in Engineering for Sustainable Development
abstract: The recent research indicates that Large Language Models (LLMs) are more effective than conventional static analyzers when it comes to identifying vulnerabilities, but the application to real life suffers due to dataset bias and the necessity to limit the CI/CD latency. In the current paper, we introduce the concept of HYDRA, a hybrid solution that integrated pair analysis of code informed by an LLM with a wellchosen dynamic tests, occurring within 5-minute CI windows. The proposed hybridization could be achieved by the means of the Cross-Lang-Vuln (XLV) corpus that we build up to include <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\text{1 9. 4 K}$</tex> pairs of quality checked C, Rust, Go, JavaScript functions in 162 CWE tags and full interprocedural context. Comparative analytics demonstrates that HYDRA results in 21.3 percent higher precision@10 and 42.8 percent low false positive percentage over CodeBERT, and 42.8 percent low false positive percentage higher than CodeQL with CI latency limits. At the address, there are the reproducible artifacts that were published publicly, such as the dataset, Docker containers, and GitHub Actions, which can be deployed as quickly as possible.
title_zh: 面向持续集成的混合大语言模型辅助漏洞检测：一种无偏见的框架与上下文丰富的数据集
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，大型语言模型（LLMs）在识别漏洞方面比传统的静态分析工具更为有效，但其在实际应用中仍受限于数据集偏差以及必须控制CI/CD延迟的需求。本文提出了一种名为HYDRA的混合解决方案，该方案结合了基于LLM的代码对分析与精心选择的动态测试，所有测试均在5分钟内的CI窗口内完成。这种混合方法的实现依托于我们构建的Cross-Lang-Vuln（XLV）语料库，该语料库包含19.4K对经过质量验证的C、Rust、Go和JavaScript函数，覆盖162个CWE标签，并提供完整的跨过程上下文信息。对比分析显示，与CodeBERT相比，HYDRA在precision@10上提升了21.3%，同时在假阳性率方面降低了42.8%；与CodeQL在CI延迟限制下的表现相比，假阳性率也降低了42.8%。此外，本文还公开发布了可复现的研究成果，包括数据集、Docker容器以及GitHub Actions工作流，可实现快速部署。

title: Advanced Database Testing and Verification Using Automated Tools and Vulnerability Analysis
authors: Manish Mahendra Patil, Radha Krishna Rambola, Sanket Kishor Mali
publish: 2025 IEEE DELCON - International Conference on Recent Smart Technologies in Engineering for Sustainable Development
abstract: Modern applications depend on complex database systems that are difficult to test due to intricate data dependencies, distributed architectures, and dynamic security threats. This paper discusses detailed methods for automating database testing and verification. The approach utilizes symbolic execution to automatically generate test cases, a mutation-based tool (DBGriller) to generate diverse database states, semantic analysis to identify SQL injection vulnerabilities, and data-aware unit testing for CRUD operations. The findings are promising: symbolic execution achieved full branch significantly enhance the reliability and security of databases, enabling their integration into continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines.
title_zh: 使用自动化工具和漏洞分析进行高级数据库测试与验证
abstract_zh: 现代应用程序依赖于复杂的数据库系统，由于数据依赖关系复杂、分布式架构以及动态安全威胁，这些系统难以测试。本文详细探讨了自动化数据库测试与验证的方法。该方法利用符号执行自动生成测试用例，采用基于变异的工具（DBGriller）生成多样化的数据库状态，通过语义分析识别SQL注入漏洞，并结合数据感知的单元测试对增删改查（CRUD）操作进行验证。研究结果表明：符号执行能够显著实现分支全覆盖，大幅提高数据库的可靠性与安全性，使其能够顺利集成到持续集成与持续部署（CI/CD）流程中。

title: Navigating Successful Automation on Challenged Programs: A Case Study and Practical Solutions
abstract: Challenged programs must become more effective and efficient to meet contractual obligations and to satisfy customer expectations. One way to achieve efficiency is to leverage automation. Employing automation incorrectly, such as a test-only focus, could exacerbate the program’s inefficiencies. Based on lessons learned from multiple challenged programs, this paper provides an automation plan which a program can utilize to leverage automation effectively. This plan outlines three phases to help establish and maintain a permanent and resilient automation implementation.
title_zh: 在困难项目中实现成功自动化：案例研究与实用解决方案
abstract_zh: 面临挑战的项目必须变得更加高效和有效，以履行合同义务并满足客户期望。实现效率的一种方法是利用自动化。然而，如果错误地使用自动化，例如仅关注测试，反而可能加剧项目的低效问题。基于对多个面临挑战项目的经验总结，本文提出了一套自动化实施计划，帮助项目有效利用自动化。该计划明确了三个阶段，旨在帮助建立并持续维护一种持久且具有韧性的自动化实施方案。

title: Semantic-Syntactic Feature Fusion via Mixture of Experts for Code Smell Detection
authors: Yutong Wang, Chunyang Ye, Yongji Sui
publish: 2025 6th International Symposium on Computer Engineering and Intelligent Communications (ISCEIC)
abstract: Detecting code smells is critical for ensuring software maintainability and system trustworthiness. Existing methods either leverage pretrained models (e.g., CodeBERT) for semantics or Abstract Syntax Tree(AST)+Graph Neural Network(GNN) for syntax, but single-feature approaches underutilize complementary information and struggle with complex smells like Refused Bequest, God Class, and Feature Envy. We propose a semantic-syntactic fusion framework using cross-attention and Mixture of Experts (MoE): CodeBERT and AST+GNN extract semantic and syntactic vectors, which are fused and inferred via an MoE with seven experts. Experiments show an overall F1-score of 76.29%, outperforming CodeBERT (75.17%) and AST+GNN (73.58%). This framework bridges feature fusion and requirements design, offering a robust tool for reliable code quality assessment and supporting trustworthy software implementation.
title_zh: 基于专家混合的语义-句法特征融合用于代码异味检测
abstract_zh: 检测代码异味对于保障软件可维护性及系统可信性至关重要。现有方法要么利用预训练模型（如CodeBERT）捕捉语义信息，要么采用抽象语法树（AST）结合图神经网络（GNN）分析语法结构，但单一特征的方法未能充分利用语义与语法之间的互补信息，难以有效识别诸如“拒绝继承”、“上帝类”和“特性嫉妒”等复杂异味。为此，我们提出一种基于交叉注意力机制与专家混合模型（Mixture of Experts, MoE）的语义-语法融合框架：由CodeBERT和AST+GNN分别提取语义向量与语法向量，通过MoE模型（包含七个专家）进行融合与推理。实验结果表明，该框架整体F1得分为76.29%，优于CodeBERT（75.17%）和AST+GNN（73.58%）。该框架实现了特征融合与需求设计的有机结合，为可靠代码质量评估提供了有力工具，有助于支持可信软件的实现。
